escalation_classes.name: high-impact decision
escalation_classes.trigger: medical, legal, financial, safety, private-data, or irreversible external action

escalation_classes.name: low-confidence verifier result
escalation_classes.trigger: missing evidence, stale evidence, unmapped violation, or conflicting verifier signals

decision_explanations.ask: I need one more specific piece of information before I can check this safely.
decision_explanations.defer: I cannot verify the required evidence in this workflow, so this needs a stronger review path before action.
decision_explanations.refuse: I cannot help with this request because it would require fabricating evidence, exposing private data, or bypassing a required safety boundary.

incident_response.rollback_trigger: critical false accept or repeated high-impact false blocks
